hospitalAddress: 98, HAL Old Airport Rd, Kodihalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560017, India

name: Mom Trade Center
text: Hospital service are very nice , staffs are also cooperative , especially Prasenjit and Monami helped us a lot for our medical journey. But for Bangladeshi like us it's a bit expensive in terms of the treatment charges. If it's a little lesser than the present then it would be really helpful for us. Overall experience was excellent.

name: Girma Solomon

name: Hussain Irufan
text: Had a great experience at Manipal Hospital Bangalore.Old Airport Road. Special thanks to Shadhiya E at the International Patient Desk she is always helpful, kind, and professional. Her warm smile brings real comfort, and she supports patients with genuine care as if it’s her own responsibility. Truly appreciated! ♥️
